title: Document
description: A document associated with an estate — wills, codicils, trust deeds, and religious documents (shtar_chov, ketubah_document, nikah_nama, etc.). Type is a free string (minLength 1) to accommodate jurisdiction-specific and religious document types.

id.description: Unique identifier for this document within the INHERIT document.

type.$comment: Free string — common values include: will, codicil, trust_deed, grant_of_probate, death_certificate, shtar_chov, ketubah_document, nikah_nama, waqfiyyah, deed_of_variation, power_of_attorney.
type.description: The type of document. Free-form text to accommodate the enormous variety of estate-related documents across jurisdictions and legal traditions.

examples: Last Will and Testament of James Davies

fileFormat.$comment: File extension or format identifier (e.g. pdf, docx, jpg).
fileFormat.description: File format or extension. Use lowercase without a leading dot.

storageRef.description: Storage reference — an S3 URI, file path, external system reference, or document management system identifier.

fileSizeBytes.description: File size in bytes. Zero for metadata-only entries where the document content is stored externally.

mimeType.description: MIME type of the document file.

createdDate.description: Date the document was created or executed.

notes.description: Free-text notes about this document. Use for provenance, authenticity concerns, or handling instructions.
examples: Original held by Irwin Mitchell LLP, Manchester
Certified copy — original lost in 2020 house fire

entityType.description: The type of entity this document relates to. Combined with entityId, creates a contextual link: 'this PDF is the valuation certificate for asset X'.

entityId.description: The ID of the entity this document relates to. Combined with entityType, links the document to its subject.

images.description: Scans or photographs of this document — useful when the original is a physical paper document.
